title: [epic] Renode LoRa simulation ecosystem extraction
description:
Meta-epic: extract LICHEN Renode work as standalone open-source monorepo.

REPO: renode-lora-peripherals (single repo, split later if demand)

STRUCTURE:
  renode-lora-peripherals/
  ├── peripherals/
  │   ├── sx126x/           # SX1261/62/68 (490 lines)
  │   └── stm32wl-subghz/   # STM32WL integrated radio (341 lines)
  ├── boards/
  │   ├── t-echo/
  │   ├── rak4631/
  │   ├── t-deck/
  │   ├── heltec-wifi-lora32-v3/
  │   └── nucleo-wl55jc/
  ├── stubs/
  │   ├── gps.cs            # NMEA over UART (218 lines)
  │   └── ble.cs            # nRF52840 BLE stub (511 lines)
  ├── examples/
  │   ├── zephyr-lora-tx/
  │   └── meshtastic-boot/
  └── README.md

WHY MONOREPO:
- Audience is tiny, dont over-engineer
- Boards depend on peripherals, avoids version skew
- One CI matrix, one issue tracker
- Can still upstream individual .cs files to Renode as PRs
- Easy to fork out SX126x later if it takes off independently

CHILDREN (now phases, not separate repos):
- ddcu: Phase 1 - SX126x peripheral extraction
- 94ju: Phase 2 - Board definitions extraction
- tg2h: Phase 3 - STM32WL peripheral extraction

TIMING: P3 - after simulation works for our needs (sz52 gate)
